title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 7 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 7 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 7 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/04/2026
Today, DCE iron ore futures rose before falling today. The most-traded I2605 contract ultimately closed at 797.5 yuan/mt,down 0.44% from the previous trading session. Spot prices fell 2-5 yuan/mt from the previous trading day.
